headline: RBC Capital Maintains Outperform on Jack Henry & Associates, Lowers Price Target to $180
summary: RBC Capital  analyst Daniel R. Perlin   maintains Jack Henry & Associates (NASDAQ:JKHY) with a Outperform and lowers the price target from $210 to $180.

headline: Down 9.6% in 4 Weeks, Here's Why Jack Henry (JKHY) Looks Ripe for a Turnaround
summary: Jack Henry (JKHY) has become technically an oversold stock now, which implies exhaustion of the heavy selling pressure on it. This, combined with strong agreement among Wall Street analysts in revising earnings estimates higher, indicates a potential trend reversal for the stock in the near term.
